---
title: "SEEG Archetype and EEG Microstate Relationship"
output: html_document
params:
  report_root: "artifacts/runs/20260412_140500/reports"
  runtime_hash: "97411c0ec4"
  output_dir: "artifacts/manual/archetype_eeg_microstate_relationship"
  template_similarity_csv: ""
  state_preference_csv: ""
  fine_lag_csv: ""
  subject_peak_csv: ""
  switching_csv: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
source("_common.R")

resolve_repo_path <- function(path, must_exist = TRUE) {
  if (is.null(path) || !nzchar(path)) {
    stop("A non-empty path parameter is required.")
  }
  is_absolute <- grepl("^[A-Za-z]:[/\\\\]|^/", path)
  candidates <- if (is_absolute) c(path) else c(path, file.path("..", path))
  if (must_exist) {
    for (candidate in candidates) {
      if (file.exists(candidate)) {
        return(normalizePath(candidate, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))
      }
    }
    stop(paste("Could not resolve path:", path))
  }
  candidate <- candidates[[length(candidates)]]
  normalizePath(candidate, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
}

for (pkg in c("svglite", "ggdist", "ggtext", "paletteer", "patchwork")) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop(paste0("Missing required package '", pkg, "'. Install it with: install.packages('", pkg, "')"))
  }
}

library(ggdist)
library(ggtext)
library(paletteer)
library(patchwork)

report_root <- resolve_repo_path(params$report_root, must_exist = TRUE)
runtime_hash <- params$runtime_hash
output_dir <- ensure_output_dir(resolve_repo_path(params$output_dir, must_exist = FALSE))
output_stem <- paste0("seeg_archetype_eeg_microstate_", runtime_hash)

find_report_csv <- function(explicit_path, subdir, label_pattern) {
  if (!is.null(explicit_path) && nzchar(explicit_path)) {
    return(resolve_repo_path(explicit_path, must_exist = TRUE))
  }

  hash_fragment <- if (!is.null(runtime_hash) && nzchar(runtime_hash)) runtime_hash else ""
  search_pattern <- file.path(
    report_root,
    subdir,
    paste0("*", label_pattern, "*", hash_fragment, ".csv")
  )
  matches <- Sys.glob(search_pattern)
  if (length(matches) < 1) {
    stop(paste("No CSV matched:", search_pattern))
  }
  normalizePath(sort(matches)[[1]], winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
}

read_validated_csv <- function(path, required_cols, label) {
  df <- read.csv(path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop(paste(label, "is missing required columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")))
  }
  df
}

template_similarity_path <- find_report_csv(
  params$template_similarity_csv,
  "main_tables",
  "archetype_eeg_template_similarity"
)
fine_lag_path <- find_report_csv(
  params$fine_lag_csv,
  "main_tables",
  "archetype_eeg_fine_lag_synchrony"
)
state_preference_path <- find_report_csv(
  params$state_preference_csv,
  "supplementary_tables",
  "archetype_eeg_state_preference"
)
subject_peak_path <- find_report_csv(
  params$subject_peak_csv,
  "supplementary_tables",
  "archetype_eeg_fine_lag_subject_peaks"
)
switching_path <- find_report_csv(
  params$switching_csv,
  "supplementary_tables",
  "archetype_to_eeg_switching"
)

template_similarity <- read_validated_csv(
  template_similarity_path,
  c("assigned_archetype", "microstate", "n_subjects", "mean_similarity", "median_similarity", "min_similarity"),
  "template_similarity_csv"
)
state_preference <- read_validated_csv(
  state_preference_path,
  c("assigned_archetype", "microstate", "n_subjects", "mean_effect", "q_fdr", "mean_conditional_probability", "mean_baseline_probability"),
  "state_preference_csv"
)
fine_lag <- read_validated_csv(
  fine_lag_path,
  c("lag_ms", "n_subjects", "mean_effect", "median_effect", "q_fdr", "mean_observed_coupling", "mean_null_mean_coupling"),
  "fine_lag_csv"
)
subject_peaks_raw <- read_validated_csv(
  subject_peak_path,
  c("patient_id", "peak_lag_ms", "peak_effect_mean_diff", "peak_width_ms", "peak_p_perm"),
  "subject_peak_csv"
)
switching <- read_validated_csv(
  switching_path,
  c("from_state", "to_state", "response_kind", "response_state", "n_subjects", "mean_effect", "q_fdr"),
  "switching_csv"
)

archetype_levels <- sort(unique(c(template_similarity$assigned_archetype, state_preference$assigned_archetype)))
microstate_levels <- sort(unique(c(template_similarity$microstate, state_preference$microstate)))

format_archetype <- function(x) {
  factor(paste("Archetype", x), levels = paste("Archetype", archetype_levels))
}

format_microstate <- function(x) {
  factor(paste("Microstate", x), levels = paste("Microstate", microstate_levels))
}

template_similarity <- template_similarity %>%
  mutate(
    archetype_label = format_archetype(assigned_archetype),
    microstate_label = format_microstate(microstate),
    label_value = sprintf("%.3f", mean_similarity)
  )

state_preference <- state_preference %>%
  mutate(
    archetype_label = format_archetype(assigned_archetype),
    microstate_label = format_microstate(microstate),
    effect_pp = mean_effect * 100,
    conditional_pct = mean_conditional_probability * 100,
    baseline_pct = mean_baseline_probability * 100,
    label_value = sprintf("%+.2f pp", effect_pp),
    q_label = ifelse(q_fdr < 0.05, "q<0.05", "")
  )

fine_lag <- fine_lag %>%
  arrange(lag_ms) %>%
  mutate(
    effect_x1000 = mean_effect * 1000,
    observed_x1000 = mean_observed_coupling * 1000,
    null_x1000 = mean_null_mean_coupling * 1000,
    is_fdr_significant = q_fdr < 0.05
  )

subject_alias <- subject_peaks_raw %>%
  distinct(patient_id) %>%
  arrange(patient_id) %>%
  mutate(patient_alias = sprintf("sub-%02d", row_number()))

subject_peaks <- subject_peaks_raw %>%
  left_join(subject_alias, by = "patient_id") %>%
  mutate(
    peak_effect_x1000 = peak_effect_mean_diff * 1000,
    peak_p_label = ifelse(peak_p_perm < 0.05, "p<0.05", "n.s.")
  ) %>%
  select(-patient_id)

switching_any <- switching %>%
  filter(response_kind == "any-switch") %>%
  mutate(
    from_label = format_archetype(from_state),
    to_label = format_archetype(to_state),
    effect_pp = mean_effect * 100,
    label_value = sprintf("%+.2f pp", effect_pp),
    q_label = ifelse(q_fdr < 0.05, "q<0.05", "")
  )

best_template_match <- template_similarity %>%
  group_by(archetype_label) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = mean_similarity, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  transmute(
    archetype_label,
    best_template_microstate = microstate_label,
    mean_similarity = round(mean_similarity, 4)
  )

best_state_preference <- state_preference %>%
  group_by(archetype_label) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = mean_effect, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  transmute(
    archetype_label,
    best_preferred_microstate = microstate_label,
    preference_pp = round(effect_pp, 3),
    q_fdr = round(q_fdr, 4)
  )

relationship_summary <- best_template_match %>%
  left_join(best_state_preference, by = "archetype_label")

archetype_palette <- as.character(paletteer::paletteer_d("ggthemes::Tableau_10"))[c(1, 2, 3, 4)]
names(archetype_palette) <- paste("Archetype", archetype_levels)

bg_fill <- "#FBF7F1"
panel_fill <- "#FFFDF8"
grid_color <- "#E4DCCF"
ink_color <- "#1F2A33"
muted_color <- "#5B6670"
warm_low <- "#F4EADC"
warm_mid <- "#D49A51"
warm_high <- "#7B2D26"
cool_low <- "#2166AC"
hot_high <- "#B2182B"

relationship_theme <- function(base_size = 11) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = bg_fill, color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = panel_fill, color = NA),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = bg_fill, color = NA),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#EFE6D8", color = NA),
      strip.text = ggtext::element_markdown(face = "bold", color = ink_color, lineheight = 1.05),
      plot.title = element_blank(),
      plot.subtitle = element_blank(),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", color = ink_color),
      axis.text = element_text(color = ink_color),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = grid_color, linewidth = 0.34),
      plot.margin = margin(10, 14, 10, 10),
      panel.spacing = grid::unit(0.9, "lines"),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", color = ink_color),
      legend.text = element_text(color = ink_color),
      plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = rel(1.2), color = ink_color)
    )
}

save_svg <- function(plot_obj, output_path, width = 8, height = 5) {
  ggplot2::ggsave(
    output_path,
    plot = plot_obj,
    width = width,
    height = height,
    device = svglite::svglite,
    bg = bg_fill
  )
  output_path
}

# A. Categorical x categorical + continuous similarity: matrix heatmap is the native display.
template_best_cells <- template_similarity %>%
  group_by(archetype_label) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = mean_similarity, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

template_similarity_plot <- ggplot(
  template_similarity,
  aes(x = microstate_label, y = archetype_label, fill = mean_similarity)
) +
  geom_tile(color = panel_fill, linewidth = 0.55) +
  geom_point(
    data = template_best_cells,
    shape = 21,
    size = 8.6,
    stroke = 0.75,
    color = ink_color,
    fill = NA
  ) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label_value), color = ink_color, size = 3.35, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c(warm_low, warm_mid, warm_high),
    name = "Mean template\nsimilarity"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "EEG microstate",
    y = "SEEG archetype"
  ) +
  relationship_theme(base_size = 10.7) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 28, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

# B. Conditional state preference is a signed probability difference.
state_preference_plot <- ggplot(
  state_preference,
  aes(x = microstate_label, y = archetype_label, fill = effect_pp)
) +
  geom_tile(color = panel_fill, linewidth = 0.55) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label_value), color = ink_color, size = 3.2, fontface = "bold") +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = q_label),
    nudge_y = -0.32,
    color = muted_color,
    size = 2.4,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = cool_low,
    mid = panel_fill,
    high = hot_high,
    midpoint = 0,
    name = "Preference\nchange"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "EEG microstate",
    y = "SEEG archetype"
  ) +
  relationship_theme(base_size = 10.7) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 28, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

# C. Lag is continuous and signed, so a native-resolution curve is most appropriate.
fine_lag_plot <- ggplot(fine_lag, aes(x = lag_ms, y = effect_x1000)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "#A8A096", linewidth = 0.45) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "#A8A096", linewidth = 0.45, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_area(fill = scales::alpha(warm_mid, 0.18), color = NA) +
  geom_line(color = warm_high, linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = is_fdr_significant), shape = 21, color = ink_color, size = 2.45, stroke = 0.35) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(`TRUE` = hot_high, `FALSE` = panel_fill),
    labels = c(`TRUE` = "q < 0.05", `FALSE` = "n.s."),
    name = "FDR"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = sort(unique(fine_lag$lag_ms))) +
  labs(
    x = "Lag from SEEG archetype to EEG microstate (ms)",
    y = "Coupling effect vs permuted baseline (x10^-3)"
  ) +
  relationship_theme(base_size = 10.7) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = grid_color, linewidth = 0.25),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

# D. Subject peaks are continuous lag/effect pairs; the scatter keeps both dimensions visible.
subject_peak_plot <- ggplot(
  subject_peaks,
  aes(x = peak_lag_ms, y = peak_effect_x1000)
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "#A8A096", linewidth = 0.45) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "#A8A096", linewidth = 0.45, linetype = "dashed") +
  stat_ellipse(color = scales::alpha(ink_color, 0.38), linewidth = 0.45, linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_point(aes(fill = peak_width_ms), shape = 21, color = "white", size = 3.25, stroke = 0.35, alpha = 0.96) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c(warm_low, warm_mid, warm_high),
    name = "Peak width\n(ms)"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Subject peak lag (ms)",
    y = "Subject peak coupling effect (x10^-3)"
  ) +
  relationship_theme(base_size = 10.7) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

# E. Switching is transition-level categorical data; use a source-by-target transition heatmap.
switching_plot <- ggplot(
  switching_any,
  aes(x = to_label, y = from_label, fill = effect_pp)
) +
  geom_tile(color = panel_fill, linewidth = 0.55) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label_value), color = ink_color, size = 3.05, fontface = "bold") +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = q_label),
    nudge_y = -0.32,
    color = muted_color,
    size = 2.35,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = cool_low,
    mid = panel_fill,
    high = hot_high,
    midpoint = 0,
    name = "EEG switching\neffect"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Target SEEG archetype",
    y = "Source SEEG archetype"
  ) +
  relationship_theme(base_size = 10.7) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 28, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

main_panel_plot <- (template_similarity_plot | state_preference_plot) /
  (fine_lag_plot | subject_peak_plot) /
  switching_plot +
  patchwork::plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1.05, 1), guides = "collect") +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") &
  relationship_theme(base_size = 10.7) &
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, color = ink_color)
  )

summary_csv_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_relationship_summary.csv"))
template_csv_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_template_similarity_matrix.csv"))
preference_csv_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_state_preference_matrix.csv"))
fine_lag_csv_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_fine_lag_curve.csv"))
subject_peak_csv_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_subject_peak_summary_anonymized.csv"))
switching_csv_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_archetype_to_eeg_switching_any.csv"))

main_panel_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_relationship_main_panel.svg"))
template_similarity_plot_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_template_similarity_heatmap.svg"))
state_preference_plot_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_state_preference_heatmap.svg"))
fine_lag_plot_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_fine_lag_coupling_curve.svg"))
subject_peak_plot_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_subject_peak_lag_effect.svg"))
switching_plot_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_archetype_to_eeg_switching_heatmap.svg"))

write.csv(relationship_summary, summary_csv_path, row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(template_similarity, template_csv_path, row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(state_preference, preference_csv_path, row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(fine_lag, fine_lag_csv_path, row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(subject_peaks, subject_peak_csv_path, row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(switching_any, switching_csv_path, row.names = FALSE)

save_svg(template_similarity_plot, template_similarity_plot_path, width = 7.8, height = 5.8)
save_svg(state_preference_plot, state_preference_plot_path, width = 7.8, height = 5.8)
save_svg(fine_lag_plot, fine_lag_plot_path, width = 9.2, height = 5.7)
save_svg(subject_peak_plot, subject_peak_plot_path, width = 7.8, height = 5.7)
save_svg(switching_plot, switching_plot_path, width = 7.8, height = 5.9)
save_svg(main_panel_plot, main_panel_path, width = 16.8, height = 15.2)
```

## Inputs

```{r input-summary}
knitr::kable(
  data.frame(
    item = c(
      "report_root",
      "runtime_hash",
      "template_similarity_csv",
      "state_preference_csv",
      "fine_lag_csv",
      "subject_peak_csv",
      "switching_csv",
      "output_dir"
    ),
    value = c(
      report_root,
      runtime_hash,
      template_similarity_path,
      state_preference_path,
      fine_lag_path,
      subject_peak_path,
      switching_path,
      output_dir
    )
  ),
  col.names = c("Item", "Value")
)
```

## Relationship Summary

```{r summary-table}
knitr::kable(relationship_summary)
```

## Main Panel

```{r main-panel, fig.width=16.8, fig.height=15.2}
main_panel_plot
```

## Template Similarity

```{r template-similarity, fig.width=7.8, fig.height=5.8}
template_similarity_plot
```

## State Preference

```{r state-preference, fig.width=7.8, fig.height=5.8}
state_preference_plot
```

## Fine-Lag Coupling

```{r fine-lag, fig.width=9.2, fig.height=5.7}
fine_lag_plot
```

## Subject Peak Lag and Effect

```{r subject-peaks, fig.width=7.8, fig.height=5.7}
subject_peak_plot
```

## Archetype-to-EEG Switching

```{r switching, fig.width=7.8, fig.height=5.9}
switching_plot
```

## Outputs

```{r outputs-table}
output_manifest <- data.frame(
  artifact = c(
    basename(summary_csv_path),
    basename(template_csv_path),
    basename(preference_csv_path),
    basename(fine_lag_csv_path),
    basename(subject_peak_csv_path),
    basename(switching_csv_path),
    basename(main_panel_path),
    basename(template_similarity_plot_path),
    basename(state_preference_plot_path),
    basename(fine_lag_plot_path),
    basename(subject_peak_plot_path),
    basename(switching_plot_path)
  ),
  path = c(
    summary_csv_path,
    template_csv_path,
    preference_csv_path,
    fine_lag_csv_path,
    subject_peak_csv_path,
    switching_csv_path,
    main_panel_path,
    template_similarity_plot_path,
    state_preference_plot_path,
    fine_lag_plot_path,
    subject_peak_plot_path,
    switching_plot_path
  )
)
knitr::kable(output_manifest)
```
